item.title: Tops Markets LLC: Garland Fresh Peeled Garlic 6 oz. bag Recall
item.product: Garland Fresh Peeled Garlic 6 oz. bag
item.summary: The potential contamination with Clostridium botulinum, due to risk of temperature abuse during chilled storage at the firm Product details: Garland Fresh Peeled Garlic 6 oz. bag
item.remedy: Affected quantity: 2,112 cases (12 units per case) (total)
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
